SparSCit

SparSCit

Advanced Tools (sparscit.adv)

Landscape & Grid

  • src.advanced._landscape_config.create_landscape_scaffold() — Create a LandscapeScaffold

  • src.advanced._griddata.make_grid() — Create a grid for landscape visualization

  • src.advanced._griddata.griddata_numerical() — Interpolate numerical data onto a grid

  • src.advanced._griddata.griddata_categorical() — Interpolate categorical data onto a grid

  • src.advanced._griddata.griddata_apply_transformations() — Apply transformations to gridded data

  • src.advanced._grid.same_grid() — Align two grids

Dynamics & HMMs

  • src.advanced._dynamics.landscape_dynamics() — Compute landscape dynamics over time

  • src.advanced._dynamics.griddata_correlations() — Compute correlations on gridded data

  • src.advanced._dynamics.dynamics_add_expression_data() — Add expression data to dynamics

  • src.advanced._pomegranate.create_hmm() — Create a Hidden Markov Model

  • src.advanced._pomegranate.create_hmm_system() — Create a multi-cell-type HMM system

  • src.advanced._pomegranate.fit_hmm() — Fit an HMM to data

  • src.advanced._pomegranate.calculate_correlation() — Calculate correlation in HMM context

  • src.advanced._hmm.get_probabilities() — Get state probabilities from an HMM

  • src.advanced._hmm.predict_observations() — Predict observations using an HMM

Community & Enrichment

  • src.advanced._community.leiden_matrix() — Leiden clustering returning membership matrix

  • src.advanced._community.random_neighborhood_matrix() — Random neighborhood matrix

  • src.advanced._community.silhouette_score() — Compute silhouette score

  • src.advanced._distances.classify_enrichment() — Classify enrichment patterns

  • src.advanced._distances.neighborhood_activities() — Compute neighborhood activity profiles

  • src.advanced._density.get_assortativity() — Compute graph assortativity

Features & Summaries

  • src.advanced._features.binary_active_feature() — Compute binary active feature matrix

  • src.advanced._features.align_features() — Align feature indices between two AnnData objects

  • src.advanced._features.dense_binary_activity_matrix() — Create dense binary activity matrix

  • src.advanced._features.multi_color_copy() — Create multi-color copies of data

  • src.advanced._features.feature_to_bed() — Export features as BED format

  • src.advanced._summary.make_color_summary() — Create a color summary

  • src.advanced._summary.cluster_summaries() — Generate cluster-level summaries

  • src.advanced._summary.cocluster_summaries() — Generate co-cluster summaries

  • src.advanced._entropy.shannon_entropy() — Compute Shannon entropy

Utilities

  • src.advanced._cv2.ImageToolsCV2 — OpenCV-based image processing utilities
